query:
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.email, t.status, ten.companyName AS tenant, ten.slug
FROM technicians t
LEFT JOIN tenants ten ON t.tenantId = ten.id
ORDER BY ten.id, t.id
LIMIT 20;
